# AgentOS Documentation

> Complete documentation for AgentOS — the open-source TypeScript AI agent framework.

This site hosts guides, API reference, architecture docs, and tutorials for building autonomous AI agents with AgentOS.

## Links

- This site: https://docs.agentos.sh
- AgentOS Homepage: https://agentos.sh
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@framers/agentos
- GitHub: https://github.com/framersai/agentos
- Discord: https://discord.gg/VXXC4SJMKh

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started Guide](https://docs.agentos.sh/getting-started)
- [High-Level API Reference](https://docs.agentos.sh/getting-started/high-level-api)
- [Examples & Cookbook](https://docs.agentos.sh/getting-started/examples)
- [TypeDoc API](https://docs.agentos.sh/api)

## Architecture

- [System Architecture](https://docs.agentos.sh/architecture/system-architecture)
- [Agent Communication](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/agent-communication)
- [Platform Support (37 Channels)](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/platform-strategy)
- [Streaming Semantics](https://docs.agentos.sh/architecture/streaming-semantics)

## Features

- [Cognitive Memory (8 Mechanisms)](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/cognitive-memory)
- [HEXACO Personality Model](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/cognitive-memory-guide)
- [Multi-Agent Teams (6 Strategies)](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/agency-collaboration)
- [RAG & Memory Configuration](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/rag-memory-configuration)
- [Orchestration Guide](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/orchestration-guide)
- [Workflow DSL](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/workflow-dsl)
- [Planning Engine](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/planning-engine)
- [Guardrails & Safety](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/guardrails)
- [Human-in-the-Loop](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/human-in-the-loop)
- [Image Generation](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/image-generation)
- [Voice Pipeline](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/voice-pipeline)
- [Emergent Capabilities](https://docs.agentos.sh/features/recursive-self-building)

- [AgentOS vs LangGraph vs CrewAI vs Mastra](https://docs.agentos.sh/blog/2026/02/20/agentos-vs-langgraph-vs-crewai)
- [Build a TypeScript AI Agent in 5 Minutes](https://docs.agentos.sh/blog/build-typescript-ai-agent-5-minutes)
- [Adaptive vs. Emergent Intelligence](https://docs.agentos.sh/blog/adaptive-vs-emergent)
- [Announcing AgentOS](https://docs.agentos.sh/blog/announcing-agentos)

- Usage: Indexing, search, summarization, educational use permitted
